name: Won Ton Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw out and drain the spinach or vegetables.
2. Combine the pork, salt, soy sauce, cornstarch, egg, and oil in a bowl. Stir the mixture until the meat holds together.
3. Add the spinach and mix some more.
4. Have 1/2 cup cold water ready in a separate container.
5. Cover the stack of won ton wrappers with a damp cloth while wrapping to prevent them from drying out.
6. Wrap the won tons with the meat mixture.
7. In a large pot, bring 2 quarts of water to a boil and drop in the desired number of wrapped won-tons.
8. Bring to a boil again and add 1/2 cup cold water. Boil once more.
9. When the won-tons are done, they will float to the top; drain them.
10. Add the drained won-tons to the soup mixture.
11. In individual soup bowls, divide the minced scallions, sesame oil, soy sauce, and pepper at the bottom.
12. Pour hot broth over these ingredients.
13. Add the won tons.
